mxlibrary: [{"title": "Primary button", "w": 140, "h": 40, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Primary action\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=14;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BD1642;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"140\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Ghost button", "w": 140, "h": 40, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Ghost action\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=14;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#BD1642;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#BD1642;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"140\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Danger button", "w": 140, "h": 40, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Danger action\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=14;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBE1E8;strokeColor=#A30F37;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#A30F37;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"140\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Secondary button", "w": 140, "h": 40, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Secondary\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=14;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F6F4F7;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;strokeWidth=1;fontColor=#44424A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"140\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Pill — success", "w": 120, "h": 28, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"● Success\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F3EC;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1A6B3A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"120\" height=\"28\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Pill — warning", "w": 120, "h": 28, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"● Warning\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBF1D9;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#8A5A07;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"120\" height=\"28\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Pill — danger", "w": 120, "h": 28, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"● Danger\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBE1E8;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#A30F37;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"120\" height=\"28\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Pill — info", "w": 120, "h": 28, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"● Info\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6EEF7;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1F4F8A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"120\" height=\"28\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Surface card", "w": 240, "h": 120, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Surface card\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=6;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E8E6EA;strokeWidth=1;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"240\" height=\"120\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Accent node (crimson)", "w": 200, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Accent\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDF2F5;strokeColor=#BD1642;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#87092C;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Divider (ink-200, 2px)", "w": 240, "h": 2, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"\" style=\"rounded=0;fillColor=#E8E6EA;strokeColor=none;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"240\" height=\"2\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Cluster — internal (solid)", "w": 320, "h": 160, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Internal\" style=\"swimlane;html=1;startSize=28;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#44424A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=12;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"320\" height=\"160\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Cluster — external (dashed)", "w": 320, "h": 160, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"External\" style=\"swimlane;html=1;startSize=28;fillColor=#FAFAF7;strokeColor=#8A8790;dashed=1;fontColor=#44424A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=12;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"320\" height=\"160\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Service", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Service\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=6;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;strokeWidth=1;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Library / crate (cube)", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Library\" style=\"shape=cube;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;size=10;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Binding (cube, accent)", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Binding\" style=\"shape=cube;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDF2F5;strokeColor=#BD1642;fontColor=#87092C;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;size=10;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Consumer pkg (folder)", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Consumer\" style=\"shape=folder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;tabWidth=46;tabHeight=14;tabPosition=left;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Host app", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Host app\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=6;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAF7;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "External system (cloud)", "w": 140, "h": 80, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"External\" style=\"shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F6F4F7;strokeColor=#8A8790;fontColor=#44424A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"140\" height=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Database (cylinder)", "w": 100, "h": 70, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Database\" style=\"shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=14;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"100\" height=\"70\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "File / artifact (document)", "w": 100, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"File\" style=\"shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"100\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Cache (pill)", "w": 120, "h": 40, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Cache\" style=\"rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAF7;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"120\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Queue / stream (hexagon)", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Queue\" style=\"shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAF7;strokeColor=#D4D1D6;fontColor=#0A0A0B;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Registry (folder, ink)", "w": 130, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Registry\" style=\"shape=folder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;tabWidth=46;tabHeight=14;tabPosition=left;fillColor=#F6F4F7;strokeColor=#8A8790;fontColor=#44424A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"130\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Actor / user", "w": 44, "h": 60, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Actor\" style=\"shape=umlActor;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#67646D;strokeColor=#67646D;fontColor=#44424A;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;labelPosition=center;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"44\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — sync", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#67646D;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontColor=#44424A;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — async (dashed)", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#67646D;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontColor=#44424A;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — dependency (thin dashed)", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#8A8790;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontColor=#67646D;fontStyle=2;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — data primary (crimson)", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=classicThin;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#BD1642;strokeWidth=2.5;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#87092C;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — data warning", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=classicThin;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#8A5A07;strokeWidth=2.5;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#8A5A07;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — data danger", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=classicThin;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#A30F37;strokeWidth=2.5;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#A30F37;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}, {"title": "Arrow — data info", "w": 120, "h": 20, "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" style=\"endArrow=classicThin;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#1F4F8A;strokeWidth=2.5;fontFamily=Inter;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F4F8A;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"0\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"120\" y=\"0\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>"}]
